name: linear-devotee
description: Linear project, milestone, and issue orchestration for Codex with SDD-formatted briefs and explicit mutation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and create Linear work from Codex
interface.longDescription: Linear Devotee bundles Codex skills for detecting Linear issues, producing SDD briefs, setting work in progress, planning implementation, creating Linear Projects, creating Milestones, and creating strict SDD-formatted Issues. Linear writes always stay behind explicit confirmation gates except the optional In Progress status flip during greet.
defaultPrompt: Use Linear Devotee to brief this Linear issue before implementation.
Use Linear Devotee to create a project, milestones, and issues from this spec.
